legend.LA: Limited Availability. This prescription drug may be available only at certain pharmacies.
legend.MO: Mail-Order Drug. This prescription drug is available through Express Scripts Pharmacy by Evernorth.
legend.PA: Prior Authorization. The plan requires you or your prescriber to get prior authorization for certain drugs.
legend.QL: Quantity Limit. For certain drugs, the plan limits the amount of the drug that we will cover.
legend.ST: Step Therapy. In some cases, the plan requires you to first try a certain drug to treat your medical condition before we will cover another drug for that condition.
legend.V: This vaccine is provided to adults at no cost when used based on recommendations by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention’s (CDC) Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP).

warnings: 'SYNTHROID': The drug is listed under tier 3 with ST and MO utilization management codes.
